title: Modern Texture Backport
description: Backports textures from the latest version of Minecraft to 1.7.10
body:
![Block Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NanzqppU/images/1158fd897e4bd55b3740ba67ae9680e18b7aad1e.png)
This pack backports textures (and a few other things) from the latest Minecraft versions to 1.7.10.    
As of version 2.0, it supports [Et Futurum Requiem](https://modrinth.com/mod/etfuturum) and [Village Names](https://modrinth.com/mod/village-names) as well.

Currently up to date with 26.1.2.
##
### Features:
- New block, item, mob, armor, and gui textures
- New cave, chest, door, rain, and witch sounds
- New clouds
- New cat and dog variants (Requires [MCPatcher](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcpatcher) or OptiFine)
- Warm and cold animals (Requires [MCPatcher](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcpatcher) or OptiFine)
- Biome variants of villagers (Requires [MCPatcher](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcpatcher) or OptiFine)
- New spawn eggs (Requires MCPatcher)
- New potion colors (Requires MCPatcher)
## 
### Addons:
[Biome Water Backport](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/biome-water-backport) | Backports biome tints to water on 1.7.10, requires MCPatcher or OptiFine

[Music Track Backport](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/music-track-backport) | Backports modern music tracks to 1.7.10
## 

If you have any issues or suggestions, then let me know!

I took the screenshots in [Kab's Resource Pack Showcase](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/worlds/kabs-texture-pack-showcase)
